headline: WTI As-Of Basis +$18.36; Signals Mixed
narrative: EIA physical as-of May 18 is $18.36 above CLN26's $93.89 settle, which dropped $2.71. Managed Money positioning rose but sits at the 41st percentile. Narrative is near-neutral. Physical basis is supportive; futures weakness and lagged data limit conviction.
data_quality_note: EIA physical uses latest available 2026-05-18 data; COT uses 2026-05-19 weekly report. Basis is as-of, not exact same-day.
